name: KulakanPay
summarize: A payment feature for the Barangkulakan application to support user transactions.
tech: React Native, TypeScript, CSS, Axios, RESTful API, Figma
jobdesc: Translated UI/UX designs into responsive and user-friendly interfaces. Built reusable components to improve development efficiency and consistency. Integrated RESTful APIs for dynamic data processing and display. Implemented data visualization using Highcharts to enhance monitoring and insights.

name: BCA Trend Micro
summarize: A web platform for purchasing Trend Micro antivirus products, integrated seamlessly into the BCA mobile application via WebView.
tech: React Native, JavaScript, CSS, Axios, RESTful API, Figma
jobdesc: Developed a highly responsive and user-friendly web interface tailored for the Trend Micro antivirus purchasing flow within the BCA mobile WebView container. Integrated RESTful APIs to process and handle real-time transaction and product purchase data. Ensured pixel-perfect layouts and smooth rendering across various mobile screen sizes based on Figma designs. Collaborated with the mobile development team to guarantee a seamless WebView integration and optimal performance.

name: BP-Ticketing
summarize: A ticketing website designed for submitting and tracking technical issues or complaints regarding fuel station systems.
tech: Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Axios, RESTful API, Highcharts, Figma
jobdesc: Developed responsive and user-friendly web applications based on UI/UX designs from Figma. Implemented RESTful APIs for seamless data processing. Integrated Highcharts to build interactive data visualizations on the admin dashboard. Created reusable components to optimize development efficiency.

name: P-MAP
summarize: This application is designed to monitor the quality and condition of pipeline network used in the distribution of crude oil.
tech: Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Axios, RESTful API, Highcharts, Figma
jobdesc: Developed the mobile app based on user needs to support the end-to-end wholesale transaction process. Developed reusable components and implemented Figma designs into responsive and user friendly interface. Integrated REST APIs to support data display and management, including product listings, transactions, and user profiles.

name: Fuel Management System
summarize: A web application for monitoring and managing the distribution, usage, intake, and borrowing of diesel fuel.
tech: Nuxt.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Axios, RESTful API, Shadcn UI, Highcharts, Figma
jobdesc: Analyzed system requirements and built the application framework in collaboration with the Product Manager and UI/UX team. Developed reusable components and implemented a responsive and user friendly interface based on designs from Figma. Integrated RESTful APIs to handle CRUD operations for data presentation and management.

name: Rangkul Grosir
summarize: A android application designed to facilitate wholesale buying and selling of various products, aimed at connecting suppliers and resellers through a streamlined digital platform.
tech: React Native, JavaScript, CSS, Axios, RESTful API, Figma
jobdesc: Developed the mobile app based on user needs to support the end-to-end wholesale transaction process. Developed reusable components and implemented Figma designs into responsive and user friendly interface. Integrated REST APIs to support data display and management, including product listings, transactions, and user profiles.
